theScene: After journeying through the twisting paths of the dungeon, you finally reach a large, ornately gold trimmed metal door.
There is also a convenient metal plaque on the door that says 'Boss Room'.
As you begin moving towards the door, a sudden chill goes down your spine as a monotone voice echoes through the hall.
I am Ancilla, the maid of the mistress, and no one is to disturb her slumber.
You turn around to see the source of the voice, and instead see... a mattress flying at you?!
You twist, narrowly avoiding the cushiony attack out of sheer, confused panic.
Gasping from exertion, you turn to see your mystery assailant.
Her demeanor is calm and collected, and as she starts to approach, you realize you will not be talking your way out of this.
You turn around to get a visual on Ancilla, and instead see... a mattress flying at you!
You twist, narrowly avoiding the cushiony attack! Looking around, you manage to locate your assailant.
Her demeanor is calm and collected, and as she starts to approach, you realize you will not be talking your way out of this.
